Ideal for use on roses and other flowering and ornamental plants. Fights plant fungal infections Fights infections of powdery mildew, black spot and rust (useful reductions). Protects against new fungal infestations Protects against new infestation and prevents defoliation caused by plant diseases. Next page 1 For Organic Gardening 2 Fights Fungal Infections 3 Protects Against Attacks Protect your plants from fungal diseases FungusClear Ultra 2 helps fight existing infections such as powdery mildew, black spot and rust, protects from new attacks and defoliation. Suitable for use in organic gardening, it can be used for up to six treatments per year across a variety of ornamentals including roses. For outdoor use only. The bottle is made from 100% recycled plastic. Why should I use FungusClear Ultra 2? FungusClear Ultra 2 fights infections of powdery mildew, blackspot and rust (useful reductions). Protects against new infestation. Prevents defoliation caused by diseases. Suitable for use in organic gardening. Where can I use FungusClear Ultra 2? This product can be used on roses, flowering plants and ornamental plants. It is always advisable to test a small area of the plant, by treating it and leaving for a few days, before treating the entire plant or collection. For outdoor use only. When should I use FungusClear Ultra 2? Use from April to September. Spray at the first sign of disease attack and repeat at 7-10 day intervals. Where roses were severely infected with blackspot during the previous season, spraying should start in spring as buds burst. How do I use FungusClear Ultra 2? Spray in calm conditions, avoiding bright sunlight, drought and frosts. Spray early morning (7-9am) of evening (6-8pm) to minimise risk to bees. Maximum number of treatments = 6 per year.
